channel.title: GitHub Rust Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Rust in GitHub

item.title: tursodatabase/limbo
item.description: Limbo is a work-in-progress, in-process OLTP database management system, compatible with SQLite.

item.title: sxyazi/yazi
item.description: 💥 Blazing fast terminal file manager written in Rust, based on async I/O.

item.title: 0xPlaygrounds/rig
item.description: ⚙️🦀 Build portable, modular & lightweight Fullstack Agents

item.title: DioxusLabs/dioxus
item.description: Fullstack app framework for web, desktop, mobile, and more.

item.title: meilisearch/meilisearch
item.description: A lightning-fast search API that fits effortlessly into your apps, websites, and workflow

item.title: hyperium/hyper
item.description: An HTTP library for Rust

item.title: neondatabase/neon
item.description: Neon: Serverless Postgres. We separated storage and compute to offer autoscaling, code-like database branching, and scale to zero.

item.title: influxdata/influxdb
item.description: Scalable datastore for metrics, events, and real-time analytics

item.title: denoland/deno
item.description: A modern runtime for JavaScript and TypeScript.

item.title: jj-vcs/jj
item.description: A Git-compatible VCS that is both simple and powerful

item.title: fish-shell/fish-shell
item.description: The user-friendly command line shell.

item.title: embassy-rs/embassy
item.description: Modern embedded framework, using Rust and async.

item.title: microsoft/windows-rs
item.description: Rust for Windows

item.title: helix-editor/helix
item.description: A post-modern modal text editor.

item.title: dani-garcia/vaultwarden
item.description: Unofficial Bitwarden compatible server written in Rust, formerly known as bitwarden_rs

item.title: yetanotherco/aligned_layer
item.description: Aligned is a verification layer for zero-knowledge proofs using EigenLayer. Our mission is to accelerate the adoption of zero-knowledge and validity proofs on Ethereum.

item.title: paradigmxyz/reth
item.description: Modular, contributor-friendly and blazing-fast implementation of the Ethereum protocol, in Rust

item.title: mainmatter/100-exercises-to-learn-rust
item.description: A self-paced course to learn Rust, one exercise at a time.

item.title: FuelLabs/fuel-core
item.description: Rust full node implementation of the Fuel v2 protocol.

item.title: sharkdp/bat
item.description: A cat(1) clone with wings.

item.title: biomejs/biome
item.description: A toolchain for web projects, aimed to provide functionalities to maintain them. Biome offers formatter and linter, usable via CLI and LSP.

item.title: libp2p/rust-libp2p
item.description: The Rust Implementation of the libp2p networking stack.

item.title: web-infra-dev/rspack
item.description: The fast Rust-based web bundler with webpack-compatible API 🦀️

item.title: rust-unofficial/awesome-rust
item.description: A curated list of Rust code and resources.
